# Done

## What changed

- Added a **left background sidebar container** in [./backend/src/capture/editor/window.rs](./backend/src/capture/editor/window.rs)
- Moved the main canvas into a **horizontal workspace layout** so the sidebar sits beside it
- Updated the tool-switch logic so:

  - **Background** shows the new left sidebar
  - other tools keep the sidebar hidden
- Added **window sizing support** via [./backend/src/capture/editor/ui_support.rs](./backend/src/capture/editor/ui_support.rs) so the editor grows when the Background sidebar opens
